digest.component_or_area: auto-lander bot Gerrit credential + ACL provisioning
propositions: Provision the auto-lander bot's Gerrit HTTP token as an SSM SecureString at /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token, added via the existing ssm.tf for_each set with no IAM change since it falls under the existing parameter/rebar/prod/* grant.
fetch-secrets.sh materializes the token into the shared .env as AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN using required/fail-fast get_param so a missing token aborts boot rather than producing a blank env-var.

Do not add a submit grant: RebarBotNava is already in the Contributors group which holds Submit on refs/heads/*, and an inherited All-Projects submit would be eclipsed by exclusiveGroupPermissions=submit; instead verify RebarBotNava is in Contributors.

Grant the Rebase access right to group Contributors on the rebar project's refs/heads/* in the rebar project's own refs/meta/config, not All-Projects and not a global capability or submit-strategy setting.
The rebase-on-behalf half needs no extra grant because rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader checks against the original uploader who already holds the right.

Add a read-only provisioning-verification smoke check (smoke-check-autolander.sh) that verifies auth returns 200, Contributors membership, and the rebase ACL is present, without creating or submitting a change; a missing grant fails with the exact named right per the fallback protocol.
